title: The Bifrost Keep
description: 'The Bifrost Keep' is a Light and Vanilla Friendly modpack. Its' only major feature is Applied Energistics.
body:
**'The Bifrost Keep'** is a lightweight and vanilla friendly modpack that mostly features performance mods.

It also features mods like **Inmis**, which adds backpacks to the game, **Better Anvil** and **Better Magic**, that makes both more enjoyable to use.

Finally, the pack adds the **Create** mod and **Applied Energistics 2**, which are the 'furthest from vanilla' mods that I personally feel make the game better.

It's worth mentioning that the **Create** mod is currently disabled because of incompatibility with **Sodium**. However, to make it work, enable it and disable the **Iris** mod.
